articles.title_en: Dmitriev: Lufthansa will have to refuel in Russia amid the fuel crisis
articles.lead_en: The special representative of the President of the Russian Federation commented on the publication in Western media that Germany's leading airline company Lufthansa may introduce refueling stops on some of its flights
articles.title_raw: Дмитриев: Lufthansa на фоне топливного кризиса придется заправляться в РФ
articles.lead_raw: Спецпредставитель президента РФ прокомментировал публикацию в западных СМИ, что ведущий авиаконцерн Германии Lufthansa может ввести остановки для дозаправки на некоторых своих рейсах

articles.title_en: 20 trucks from the Russian Federation and Belarus with more than 200 liters of fuel in the tank were not allowed into Lithuania

articles.title_en: Russian researchers build scientific model to forecast conflict in Persian Gulf
articles.lead_en: Among more than 70 individual indicators used by the authors are quantitative data from open sources on damage to military and civilian infrastructure, data on fluctuations in prices for energy resources and certain types of critical raw materials

articles.title_en: Georgia said that by refusing to escalate with Russia, they saved themselves and the EU
articles.lead_en: The European Union, thanks to energy and transport corridors passing through the republic, has access to energy resources, said Chairman of the Georgian Parliament Shalva Papuashvili
articles.title_raw: В Грузии заявили, что отказом от эскалации с РФ спасли себя и ЕС
articles.lead_raw: Европейский союз благодаря проходящим по республике энергетическим и транспортным коридорам имеет доступ к энергоносителям, заявил председатель грузинского парламента Шалва Папуашвили

articles.title_en: State payments to oil exporters consume nearly half of Russia’s windfall from high prices, data show
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Finance Ministry released April oil and gas revenue figures showing taxes paid by exporters for March — the first full month of the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, when oil prices spiked sharply. The independent Russian political newsletter Faridaily was among the first to flag the publication.

articles.title_en: Serbia considered favorable conditions for receiving gas from Russia

articles.title_en: Reuters reports Ukraine strikes Kinef oil refinery in Russia’s Leningrad Region, forcing shutdown
articles.lead_en: Ukraine’s military struck the Kirishi oil refinery in Russia’s Leningrad Region, known as Kinef, forcing it to shut down, the Reuters news agency reported, citing sources.
articles.title_raw: Reuters reports Ukraine strikes Kinef oil refinery in Russia’s Leningrad Region, forcing shutdown

articles.title_en: Russian forces kill 4, injure over 30 in strike on Ukraine’s Poltava region
articles.lead_en: Russian forces struck the Poltava region with drones and missiles, killing four people and knocking out gas service for nearly 3,500 subscribers, regional military administration head Vitaliy Dyakivnych reported. Direct hits and debris were recorded at two locations in the Poltava district.
articles.title_raw: Russian forces kill 4, injure over 30 in strike on Ukraine’s Poltava region

articles.title_en: ACRA: electricity consumption in Russia in the summer season may increase by 3%
articles.lead_en: The indicator will increase if the weather is hot and dry during this period, noted Denis Krasnovsky, deputy director of the corporate ratings group of the Analytical Credit Rating Agency.
articles.title_raw: АКРА: потребление электроэнергии в России в летнем сезоне может вырасти на 3%
articles.lead_raw: Показатель увеличится, если в этот период будет жаркая и сухая погода, отметил заместитель директора группы корпоративных рейтингов Аналитического кредитного рейтингового агентства Денис Красновский
